message: br-bd-rjsa: pin process_mrelease pidfd zero parity

files.patch:
@@ -816,7 +816,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-reax.2","title":"Add IFUNC relocation support to ELF loader","description":"FILES: crates/frankenlibc-core/src/elf/loader.rs:222
CURRENT: Only Phase-1 relocations supported. IFUNC (STT_GNU_IFUNC) relocations are deferred.
PROBLEM: glibc itself uses IFUNC for CPU-specific optimized versions of memcpy, memset, etc. When we try to resolve these from the host ELF, we may get the IFUNC resolver instead of the final address.
FIX: Detect IFUNC symbols and call the resolver function to get the actual implementation address.
IMPACT: Affects host_resolve.rs which parses the glibc ELF to find symbols like malloc, dlvsym, etc. If any of these are IFUNCs, we'd get the wrong address.
CONSIDERATION: On modern x86_64 glibc, malloc and dlvsym are NOT IFUNCs (they're direct symbols), but memcpy/memset ARE IFUNCs. Since we only resolve non-IFUNC symbols from host_resolve.rs, this may not be an immediate problem.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:04:57.285183747Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T19:15:50.515692509Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T19:15:50.514670096Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-reax.2","depends_on_id":"bd-reax","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:04:57.285183747Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"bd-rftd","title":"process: execute spawn_exec_ops.json fixture family through harness matrix","description":"Concrete gap: crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/spawn_exec_ops_conformance_test.rs validates schema and coverage for tests/conformance/fixtures/spawn_exec_ops.json but never drives those cases through the harness subprocess. Add isolated matrix execution for posix_spawn/execve/system fixtures, assert expected_output and host parity in strict/hardened modes, and fix any process-wrapper mismatches the new coverage exposes.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T05:56:34.380556045Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T15:57:46.979346551Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T15:57:46.977092185Z","close_reason":"Executed spawn_exec_ops fixture coverage through the isolated harness conformance matrix path and verified with rch.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-rgzu","title":"syscall: fspick NULL pathname with nonzero flags should preserve unprivileged EPERM host contract","description":"Host glibc returns EPERM for fspick(AT_FDCWD, NULL, 1) on this unprivileged host. Add ABI regression coverage so nonzero flags preserve the observed privilege-first result.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:13:32.348267860Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T08:13:32.348267860Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-rjsa","title":"syscall: process_mrelease pidfd=0 should mirror invalid-pidfd errno matrix","description":"Host glibc reports the same invalid-descriptor matrix for process_mrelease with pidfd=0 as with pidfd=-1: EBADF for flags=0 and EINVAL for flags!=0. Add focused ABI regression coverage so the wrapper stays exact on both invalid-pidfd shapes.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T07:20:45.425524704Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T07:20:45.425524704Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Add focused ABI regression coverage so the wrapper stays exact on both invalid-pidfd shapes.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T07:20:45.425524704Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T19:28:08.878281930Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T19:28:08.875988118Z","close_reason":"Pinned process_mrelease pidfd=0 behavior to exact host EBADF/EINVAL parity for flags zero and nonzero","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

 {"id":"bd-rqn","title":"Production kernel manifest: minimal required math set + compile-time gates","description":"Critique mapping: #5.

Deliverables:
- Define default production kernel (small, explainable, benchmarked).
- Add compile-time feature gates separating production vs research modules.

Acceptance:
- Default build excludes ResearchOnly modules.
- Production kernel meets strict/hardened latency budgets.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","notes":"Perf gate rerun on idle host passed (scripts/perf_gate.sh): strict deltas within threshold, hardened decide_observe delta +1.74%. However target budget checks still rely on allow_target_violation policy in perf gate, and manifest currently keeps all runtime_math modules in production with research_only_modules empty. Bead remains in_progress pending minimal production subset selection + explicit research-only migration plan.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"AzureBluff","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:11.222573367Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T16:39:50.848168045Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T16:39:50.848140263Z","close_reason":"Completed minimal production kernel manifest partition (25 production / 44 research-only), synchronized governance/policy artifacts, and validated via runtime-math gates + rch harness tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien","critique","math"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-rqn","depends_on_id":"bd-1iya","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-rqn","depends_on_id":"bd-1rxj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-rqn","depends_on_id":"bd-24x","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-rqn","depends_on_id":"bd-25pf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-rqn","depends_on_id":"bd-2k6b","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-rqn","depends_on_id":"bd-7dw2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1136,"issue_id":"bd-rqn","author":"Codex","text":"Codex here. I’ll keep changes tight and comment here if anything overlaps with your in-flight work.","created_at":"2026-02-12T21:24:18Z"},{"id":1138,"issue_id":"bd-rqn","author":"BronzePine","text":"Progress update (BronzePine): implemented bd-rqn enabling change for production/research manifest partitioning safety gates.\n\nCode changes:\n- crates/frankenlibc-harness/tests/math_governance_test.rs: added manifest_union_modules() helper and switched governance coverage assertions from production-only to manifest union (production_modules U research_only_modules).\n- scripts/check_math_governance.sh: updated Check 2/3 to validate against manifest union and updated pass/fail messaging accordingly.\n\nValidation:\n- scripts/check_math_governance.sh => PASS\n- rch doctor => PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test math_governance_test => PASS (8/8)\n- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check => PASS\n- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets => PASS (warnings only; existing unrelated warnings in frankenlibc-abi)\n- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings => FAIL due pre-existing unrelated lint debt in frankenlibc-abi (unused imports, unreachable code, dead_code, clippy style lints in locale_abi/stdio_abi/termios_abi/time_abi).\n\nRCH notes:\n- Remote offload attempted for heavy cargo commands; some runs failed open to local due worker sync instability (no-space/file-vanished on remote rsync).","created_at":"2026-02-15T17:37:03Z"},{"id":1139,"issue_id":"bd-rqn","author":"BronzePine","text":"Additional bd-rqn progress (BronzePine): updated scripts/runtime_math_admission_gate.py to support manifest partition semantics.\n\nDetails:\n- Manifest extraction now normalizes both  and .\n- Admission checks run over union(manifest sets), while ADMITTED status is restricted to modules in .\n- Production-core completeness now checks specifically against production set.\n- Admission ledger now emits  and  booleans in addition to .\n\nValidation:\n- python3 scripts/runtime_math_admission_gate.py => status=pass, errors=0\n- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_math_admission_gate_test => PASS (3/3)","created_at":"2026-02-15T17:41:34Z"},{"id":1140,"issue_id":"bd-rqn","author":"BronzePine","text":"Correction for prior note formatting: updated scripts/runtime_math_admission_gate.py to support manifest partition semantics. Manifest extraction now normalizes both production_modules and research_only_modules; admission checks run over the union while ADMITTED status is restricted to production_modules. Ledger now includes in_production_manifest and in_research_only_manifest booleans. Validation: python3 scripts/runtime_math_admission_gate.py -> pass; rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_math_admission_gate_test -> PASS (3/3).","created_at":"2026-02-15T17:41:49Z"},{"id":1141,"issue_id":"bd-rqn","author":"AzureBluff","text":"Progress update (AzureBluff, 2026-02-19): completed production-kernel partition and governance artifact alignment to unblock bd-3ot.1.

Implemented:
- tests/runtime_math/production_kernel_manifest.v1.json: moved to minimal production set (25 modules) and explicit research_only_modules (44 modules).
- tests/conformance/math_production_set_policy.v1.json: updated change_gate.manifest_sha256 to b47cd1f6283dc3bb151fb0c57b7f8ef5c1b1afe526cf2b333d92eecc37ef257b, module_count=25, and summary counts to production-only.
- tests/conformance/math_retirement_policy.json: reflected completed migration state (RC-1=0, no active waivers, migration waves=0, summary updated).
- tests/runtime_math/runtime_math_classification_matrix.v1.json: synchronized per-module in_production_manifest / in_research_only_manifest flags and summary counts with new manifest partition.
- Re-ran scripts/runtime_math_admission_gate.py to regenerate:
  - tests/runtime_math/admission_gate_report.v1.json
  - tests/runtime_math/controller_manifest.v1.json

Gate/script verification (PASS):
- scripts/check_runtime_math_manifest.sh
- scripts/check_runtime_math_classification_matrix.sh
- scripts/check_math_production_set_policy.sh
- scripts/check_math_retirement.sh
- scripts/check_runtime_math_admission.sh
- scripts/check_math_governance.sh

RCH validation:
- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_math_admission_gate_test (PASS 4/4)
- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test runtime_math_classification_matrix_test (PASS 8/8)
- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test math_production_set_policy_test (PASS 4/4)
- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test math_retirement_test (PASS 9/9)
- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check (PASS)
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets (PASS)
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings (PASS)
- rch exec -- cargo test --workspace --all-targets started remotely and progressed through broad suite but stalled in long pthread lifecycle tests; process was terminated to avoid indefinite hang.

This resolves bd-rqn’s outstanding blocker note: production manifest is now minimal, research-only routing is explicit, and policy artifacts are auditable + reproducible.
